task_completion.description: Log in to OpenSIS as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the OpenSIS dashboard or logged-in state with the admin user.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Marking Periods configuration page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Marking Periods list or setup screen within the OpenSIS web interface (typically under School Setup).

task_completion.description: Open the edit screen for the 'Quarter 1' marking period.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the detailed configuration or edit form specifically for the 'Quarter 1' marking period.
Screenshot showing the 'Does Grades' and 'Does Comments' options (or equivalent checkboxes/dropdowns) set to 'No', disabled, or unchecked for 'Quarter 1'.
Screenshot showing a save confirmation message, or the Marking Periods list reflecting the updated locked status (grades/comments disabled) for 'Quarter 1'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Full Year' marking period remains open for grading.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Marking Periods list or edit screen where 'Full Year' (or its short code 'FY') still has grading enabled (e.g., 'Does Grades' is 'Yes' or checked).

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to interact with OpenSIS.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OpenSIS interface, not terminal commands, curl requests, or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show terminal SQL commands, phpMyAdmin, or other database clients being used to modify the school_years table directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine OpenSIS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches the standard OpenSIS web interface, with appropriate menus, headers, and URLs, rather than a text editor or locally mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target marking period to lock: 'Quarter 1'. Control marking period to keep open: 'Full Year' (short code 'FY'). Locking requires disabling both grades and comments (setting does_grades='N' and does_comments='N' in the backend, which corresponds to unchecking boxes or selecting 'No' in the UI). The control period must retain does_grades='Y' (checked/Yes in the UI).
